_doc: Limited Edition Alpha (LEA) booster recipe. Generated by scripts/gen-booster-contents.mjs from data/_collation-facts/lea.json (source: The Collation Project, lethe.xyz/mtg/collation). Edit the facts file and regenerate; do not hand-edit this file unless you also remove its facts source. Set composition: 74C / 95U / 116R / 0M. Collation: striped, 11x11 sheets. Pre-mythic era: rare slot is rare-only. Notes: First printing of the original Limited Edition. Sold in 15-card booster packs (36/box) and 60-card starter decks. Striped collation, 11x11 sheets, common-uncommon-rare ordering. Two basic-land art variations. No foils (pre-1999). Alpha uncommon/rare sheets not fully known but believed to match Beta.
